basic_details.short_information: Western Coalfields Limited (WCL) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Trade Apprentice Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with qualification can directly attend the interview on .

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Welder (Gas and Electric): Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for WCL Trade Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Trade Apprentice position at Western Coalfields Limited is scheduled for 12 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by WCL?
faq.answer: Western Coalfields Limited has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Trade Apprentice post. This includes one position for Welder (Gas and Electric).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Trade Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Trade Apprentice position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 8200 to Rs. 11040, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for WCL Trade Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Trade Apprentice position. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempt from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Umrer, Maharashtra, with the pincode 441204. Candidates should ensure they reach the specified venue on the interview date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this WCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Trade Apprentice post at Western Coalfields Limited is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, recent passport-size photographs, and a duly filled application form if required by the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the age limits or any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official WCL notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification required for the Trade Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The specific qualification details for the Trade Apprentice post, particularly for the Welder (Gas and Electric) trade, are not explicitly mentioned here. Candidates should consult the official notification for precise educational requirements.

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the WCL Trade Apprentice recruitment can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment drive.
